turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. I wanted to ask, umm, do you guys have a pediatrics department? My son is 4 years old.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, absolutely! We have a full pediatric OPD at Sunrise Clinic. Dr. Harshad Mhatre is our senior pediatrician with over 15 years of experience. He sees patients Monday, Wednesday, and Friday.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Oh that's great. Is there a separate waiting area for kids? Because the last clinic we went to was so crowded.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we have a dedicated children's waiting lounge on the second floor with activity corners to keep little ones comfortable. It's kept separate from the adult OPD area.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That's such a relief. What about vaccinations — do you handle those too?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We do offer routine childhood immunizations as per the national schedule. For specific vaccines or combination shots, it's best to confirm availability when you call to book.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Happy to help. Do call back when you'd like to book an appointment for your son!
